text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During the lead-up to Mejiro Ardan's debut race,
she's motivated to improve by a sense of friendly
competition with two same-year friends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their names are Sakura Chiyono O and Yaeno
Muteki. Both are eager for an opportunity to race
with Mejiro Ardan someday, and fully support her
debut efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, in response to their invitation to run
together in an official race, Mejiro Ardan casually
announces that the fragility of her body keeps her
from being able to make any promises.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Regardless, Sakura Chiyono O and Yaeno Muteki both believe that, no matter what, they will cross paths with Mejiro Ardan in a future race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amidst the trio's intertwining hopes, Mejiro
Ardan's debut race looms right around the
corner...
